transcript: Speaker A: Hello David, regarding yesterday discussion, we are doing the needful and reverting you back soon, fastly. Speaker B: Sir, fastly? Speaker A: Enthupayaan vegam. M manassilayille? [What to say, fast. Didn't you understand?] Speaker C: Message understandable. Confidence: admirable. English: slightly damaged. Try this instead: We're working on it, and we'll get back to you soon. Speaker A: School kazhinjathinushesham English padikkaan samayam kittiyilla. Pinne client calls um meetings lum onnum confidence kuravayirunnu. Pinne promotion ulla ella swapnangalum njan vittu. Pinne enikku SpeakX kitti. [After school, I didn't get time to learn English. Then, I lacked confidence in client calls and meetings. Then, I gave up all my dreams of promotion. Then, I got SpeakX.] Speaker C: Too translated. Try speaking naturally. Speaker A: SpeakX nte AI real office conversations practice cheyyippikkum. Nammal daily life il parayunna same situations. [SpeakX's AI will make you practice real office conversations. The same situations we speak in daily life.] Speaker A: Oh hi David, just wanted to update you. We are almost done, and I'll share the final version by evening. Speaker B: Sir, update aayi. [Sir, it's updated.] Speaker C: Corporate survival mode activated. Speaker A: Ningalum inn thanne SpeakX download cheyyu. Pinne aarum ningalude promotion thadayilla. [You too download SpeakX today. Then no one will stop your promotion.]
on_screen_text: Hello David; regarding yesterday discussion; we are doing the needful and; reverting you back soon, fastly; Sir, fastly?; Enthupayaan vegam [What to say, fast]; m manassilayille? [Didn't you understand?]; Message understandable; Confidence: admirable; English: slightly damaged; Try this instead: We're working on it, and we'll get back to you soon; School kazhinjathinushesham [After school]; English padikkaan samayam kittiyilla [didn't get time to learn English]; Pinne client calls um [Then client calls and]; meetings lum onnum [meetings and all]; confidence kuravayirunnu [confidence was low]; pinne promotion nulla [then for promotion]; ella swapnangalum njan vittu [I gave up all dreams]; Pinne enikku SpeakX kitti [Then I got SpeakX]; Too translated; Try speaking naturally; Speak X nte AI real [SpeakX's AI real]; office conversations practice cheyyippikkum [will make you practice office conversations]; nammal daily life il [we in daily life]; parayunna same situations [speak same situations]; just wanted to update you; we are almost done; and I'll share the; final version by evening; Sir update aayi [Sir, updated]; Corporate survival mode; activated; Ningalum inn thanne [You too today itself]; Speak X download cheyyu [download SpeakX]; Pinne aarum ningalude [Then no one your]; promotion thadayilla [promotion will stop]; SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A professional struggles with English grammar during office calls, leading to embarrassment. An AI assistant corrects his mistakes and introduces SpeakX, an app that helps practice real-life office conversations. After using the app, his English and confidence improve, ending with a call to download SpeakX.
